_comment: Example results file an agent writes at the end of a run. Its keys map 1:1 to the injection points in dashboard-template.html. To regenerate the dashboard: produce a file like this, then paste its contents (drop the leading _comment lines) into the DASHBOARD_DATA block of the template. Every business/person here is fictional placeholder data — replace it entirely. direction is always one of: up | down | flat, and it is set by YOU to mean good/bad/neutral (green/red/grey) — for rankings, a smaller position number is better, so an improvement is 'up' even though the number went down.
